zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie於大約1280年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾奧列文時，他的父親Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk36歲，母親Elizabeth Leith31歲。他於大約1302年與Mary de Abernethy在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1324年11月28日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie于大约1280年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾奧列文时，他的父亲Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk36岁，母亲Elizabeth Leith31岁。他于大约1302年与Mary de Abernethy在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1324年11月28日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie was born about 1280, in Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Leith, was 31. He married Mary de Abernethy about 1302, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 28 November 1324, in his hometown, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie est né environ 1280, à Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Leith, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Abernethy environ 1302, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 28 novembre 1324, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie um 1280 in Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Leith 31. Er hat um 1302 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary de Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 28. November 1324 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie è nato il circa 1280 nel Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Leith, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Abernethy circa 1302, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 28 novembre 1324, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslieが約1280年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアウチレベンで生まれた時，父Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilkは36歳，母Elizabeth Leithは31歳であった。約1302年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでMary de Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1324年11月28日以前に故郷で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie(이)가 대략 1280년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 오클레븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Leith(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1302년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 Mary de Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1324년 11월 28일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Leith, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Abernethy aproximadamente 1302, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 28 de novembro de 1324, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie родился около 1280 г. в местности аучливен, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Leith, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Abernethy около 1302 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 28 ноябрь 1324 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.Abt 1280–Bef 28 November 1324: e tusa o le 1280–a'e le'I oo le 28 Novema 1324

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie nació aproximadamente 1280, en Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Leith, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mary de Abernethy aproximadamente 1302, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 28 de noviembre de 1324, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
